title: Ultra Graphics pack
description: This is a mod- / tex- / shader- pack with wich u can enhace minecrafts looks. This modpack includes 7 different shaders, 3-4 texturepacks (depends on what you define as a tex pack) and 14 mods that help to make minecraft or the perf. of your pc better.
body:
This is a tex-/ shader-/modpack to enhance minecrafts looks. **Strong GPU** and **CPU** + **min 16gb RAM** **reccomended**. 
This modpack includes **7** different **shaders**, **3-4 texturepacks** (depends on what you define as a texture pack) and **14 other mods** that help to make minecraft or the performance of your pc better. e.g: the mod called "_Sodium_" optimizes Minecraft, which helps you to get more fps.

This modpack requires the mod called "_Fabric API_" to be installed. It wont work without it! (Its included in the modpack) This modpack **CAN (*) run on servers**, but it is **not advised** to run the modpack on big servers like "_Hypixel_" for example, becaue **you may get banned if the server doesnt allow certain mods!** (*some mods like "_Distant Horizons_" for example **might NOT** work on servers.)

> _**Mod list**_:   
 **Chunky**, **Distant Horizons**, **Dynamic Crosshair**, **Fabric API**, Fabric Language Kotlin, **Iris Shaders**, **Just Zoom**, Konkrete, Silk, **Sodium**, **Veinminer**, **Xaero's Minimap**, **Xaero's World Map** and YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL).

> _**Shaders**_:
  **Bliss Shaders**, **BLS Shaders**, **Complementary Shaders - Reimagined**, **Complementary                       .   Shaders - Unbound**, Photon Shader  

> _**Recource Packs**_:
  Default HD 128x, Default HD 512x, **Fresh Animationes**, Fullbright SP.
